subcodes.title: Words spoken at home of Shaykh Salih in Abu Sinan, 1914-11-01
subcodes.first_line: In these days, wise and sound policies are needed in political affairs, but leaders are not prudent. In the Russian-Iranian War, Iran was defeated
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ایام حسن سیاست و تدابیر لازم است مردمان با تدبیر نیستند در جنگ روس و ایران
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @wisdom [hikmat]
